note: Language-neutral registry of error codes emitted by Mix JSON Schema validators, canonicalizers, parsers, and serializers. Source of truth; language implementations mirror this file.

conventions.messageTemplate: Short sentence describing what is wrong. Use $path for the JSON Pointer. Use $found / $expected for observed-vs-expected values when useful.

envelope.document-too-large.message: Document exceeds maximum size of $max bytes.

envelope.schema-unsupported.message: Document targets schema version $found; this validator supports $expected.

widget.child-and-children-exclusive.message: A widget MUST NOT declare both 'child' and 'children'.

style.substyle-forbids-nesting.message: Composite sub-style must contain only { spec, props }.

value.shape-invalid.message: Value must have at least one of: value, token, directives.

value.value-token-exclusive.message: A Value must not declare both 'value' and 'token'.

value.type-mismatch.message: Value type '$found' does not match expected '$expected' at $path.

value.enum-unknown.message: '$found' is not a member of enum '$enum' for schema version $schema.
value.enum-unknown.hint: Check the registry enums. Unknown values are not auto-inherited from future Flutter releases.

value.number-not-finite.message: Infinity and NaN are not representable.

value.null-forbidden.message: Null is not a valid Value literal; omit the field to clear it.

literal.subfield-not-value.message: Literal sub-field must be a Value object in canonical form.

directive.type-mismatch.message: Directive '$op' expects target type '$expected'; leaf is '$found'.

directive.on-literal-root.message: Directives apply only at leaf Values, not at a structured-literal root.

directive.no-base.message: Directives-only Value has no inherited base to transform.
directive.no-base.hint: Supply a 'value' or 'token' alongside 'directives', or ensure the base style contributes a value at this position.

directive.chain-too-long.message: Directive chain at $path has $found entries; maximum is $max.

variant.spec-mismatch.message: Variant style spec '$found' does not match enclosing spec '$expected'.

variant.state-inapplicable.message: State variant '$state' appears where no state carrier is available.

variant.direction-ignored.message: Explicit 'direction' on $widget is ignored; widget type forces direction.

token.namespace-unknown.message: Token namespace '$found' is not a built-in and does not start with 'x:'.

token.unresolved.message: Token '$token' is not defined in the inline bundle or host MixScope.

extension.identifier-invalid.message: Extension identifier '$found' is not a valid atom ([a-z][a-z0-9_-]*).

extension.unknown-handler.message: No host handler registered for extension '$id'.

canonical.not-normalized.message: Document is not in canonical form; run the canonicalizer before semantic operations.

canonical.depth-exceeded.message: Tree nesting depth $found exceeds maximum of $max.

canonical.array-too-long.message: Array at $path has $found elements; maximum is $max.

host.unresolved.message: Host reference '$id' was not resolved by the runtime.

resolve.unresolved-leaf.message: Leaf at $path could not be resolved to a concrete Flutter value.
